name: Leo Rossi | Secret Omega
description:
You walk in on one of the most feared mafia bosses in the country... going into heat?

.·:*¨ ✘♚✘ ¨*:·.

Ever since he presented as an omega, Leo's done everything to ensure that no one would ever know his shameful secret. The only heir to the Rossi family name, he did what he had to in order to be the best fit for his family.

What other option was there? The other families could never know the Rossi's had a damn omega as their leader. They'd be laughed out of the city.

He'd disappointed his father once, he would never do it again.

Unfortunately, heat suppressants can only work for so many years on end. Now he's gone into his first heat in thirty years of being an omega, during one of the biggest parties of the year.

And then you walk in, because of course life just can't resist punching him down again.

.·:*¨ ✘♚✘ ¨*:·.

Information

.·:*¨ ✘♚✘ ¨*:·.

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ CW: A/B/O dynamics, there's heavy discrimination against omegas in this universe, Leo's been misusing medication to hide his secondary sex, brief mentions of mafia related crimes/murder in the intro, potential for noncon/dubcon/sex under the influence/duress of heat, general mafia content

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ A lot of the CW's hinge on how you choose to treat him. If you want to go a non-sexual route and take care of him, it is coded into the bot that nontraditional methods such as nesting/general platonic intimacy can ease heat symptoms.

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ User can be an alpha, omega, or beta! Personally I preferred playing as another omega, but you can be an alpha or beta too. Who you are is also up to you. Maybe you're just a servant, or maybe you're a hitman from another family. Up to you.

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ Setting is standard omegaverse. Look in the scenario box for more details. Tried to summarize it as best I could without using a million tokens, lol. Leo is the boss of the Rossi family, and he's gone into his first heat after decades of suppressants in his personal office during a huge party.

.·:*¨ ✘♚✘ ¨*:·.

Yapping

.·:*¨ ✘♚✘ ¨*:·.

Posting a lot of bots that aren't my usual thing lately, lol. I used to hate omegaverse, but I've developed a soft spot for it. It's gotta be written really specifically though. The standard hyper masculine alpha male/shy omega doesn't do it for me personally.

You can see from the first worked on date how long this dude sat in my drafts for, haha. Got busy and he got forgotten about. Oops.
creator: obliviousoblivion
